1.3.1.en: Fixed fetch timeout (30s), redirect loop protection (max 5 redirects), and removed build artefacts from git.

1.3.0.en: Added mDNS printer discovery — pair your ET-2850 as a Homey device and use the new 'Print on paired printer' flow action. Added job status polling so flows wait for the print job to complete. Added unit test suite. Extracted utility functions to lib/utils.js.

1.2.0.en: Content type now read from HTTP response header instead of guessed from URL extension. Fixed author metadata. Removed stale README.txt.

1.1.0.en: Added configurable paper size, duplex/sides, and color mode options to the print action. Added input validation for printer IP and image URL. Fixed TLS handling to be scoped to the printer connection only. Removed unused dependencies.
